todos.content: Create Product Entity: App\Entity\Product with specified properties and attributes.
Create Product Repository: App\Repository\ProductRepository with findByCategory method.
Create Product Form: App\Form\ProductType mapping all editable fields.
Create Product Controller: App\Controller\ProductController with all 7 specified routes/actions.
Create Twig Templates: Five required templates in templates/product/.
Create Functional Test: App\Tests\Controller\ProductControllerTest checking index page returns 200.
Run code quality checks (linting/typechecking) after implementation.

part.text: I'll help implement this complete CRUD functionality. It requires creating an entity, repository, form, controller, templates, and a test file. Let me create a todo list to track this implementation.
I'll start by creating the `Product` entity at `App\Entity\Product`.
